content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(authMiddleware)
C: backcompat ∧ security ∧ minimal_diff
H: boundary_expiry
P: if(expMs<nowMs-clock_skew_grace) → returnres.status(401) → json(error:'expired_token')
V: expect(authMiddleware,req,res,next) ∧ returnnext.calledOnce
R: ! introducing_clock_skew_issue
A: adjusted_expiry_check_to_account_for_clock_skew

[AUDIT]
Add allowance for clock skew in token expiry check.

structured_data.audit: Add allowance for clock skew in token expiry check.
